Home About Order Contact

Our Colombian Heritage

A story of family, tradition, and the quiet craftsmanship behind every flavor.

Rooted in Tradition

Picao Caldense is rooted in Colombian culture, where food is not only nourishment but a symbol of identity, memory, and connection between generations.

Craft & Respect

Our approach reflects a deep respect for ingredients, slow preparation, and the discipline of traditional home cooking passed down through families.

Our Values

We believe in authenticity, consistency, and cultural pride — values that shape every bottle we produce and every table we reach.
